trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: apply the framework seed migrations to local D1 and verify seeded counts by query; add a durable script wrapper and record the remote Wrangler token blocker.
scope: Add a repo-local script that can install Wrangler dependencies, apply D1 migrations locally, and verify the seeded framework counts. Skip remote migration attempts when CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is missing to avoid Wrangler non-interactive crashes, and refresh catalog/backlog/memory/log evidence.
changes: Added scripts/verify-framework-seed-d1.ps1 to apply D1 migrations locally and verify seeded framework counts by query (requirements=16, deadlines=24, review_gates=4, quality_checks=20; req-alpha-proposal absent).
Updated the script to prefer a real Node/npm PATH order so npm postinstall scripts do not trip over the WindowsApps node shim.
Updated the script to skip remote D1 work when CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is missing (Wrangler requires an API token in non-interactive runs).
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md, docs/automation-backlog.md, docs/automation-memory.md, and docs/progress/run-log.md with the new local D1 verification evidence and remote blocker.
blockers: Remote D1 migrations and verification are blocked in this non-interactive environment until CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is provided for Wrangler.
known_limits: Remote D1 instances may still be missing migrations 0002 + 0003 until CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is configured and the remote apply succeeds.
Preview/production alpha fixtures still need a reseed pass after remote migrations are applied to confirm no flows reference req-alpha-proposal.
next_actions: Provide a CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN with D1 migration/execute permissions in the environment where wrangler runs non-interactively.

Re-run POST /api/admin/test-accounts in preview/production to migrate any existing alpha fixtures onto seeded requirement IDs (starting with req-proposal-draft) and confirm req-alpha-proposal is not referenced.
